case_title: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. VS. MARK PAGSANJAN

docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SACRAMENTO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $450.14 AS TO DEFENDANT PAGSANJAN, MARK
REQUEST FOR COURT JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $352.45 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100043006) AS TO DEFENDANT PAGSANJAN, MARK

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100039790), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. SERVED NOV-26-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE NOV-27-2018 AS TO DEFENDANT PAGSANJAN, MARK

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PAGSANJAN, MARK $7,120.70 PRINCIPAL, $925.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $352.45 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,398.15, SEE SCANNED DOC
